title: Real gundams, top 3D generator, open-source world models, ChatGPT updates, new TTS: AI NEWS
summary: An AI news video covering 25+ recent tools and models including 3D generation (Pixal3D, Articraft), world models (Sana-WM), mobile deployment (Codex on Phone), music AI (Khala), text-to-speech (DramaBox), and ChatGPT finance features. The episode highlights developments across video generation, 3D synthesis, interactive AI, and inference optimization.
